entities.name: forge-tools MCP Server
entities.description: stdio MCP server exposing 39 structured tools for git, docker, k8s, pnpm, and compliance. Compiled to server/dist/index.js.

entities.name: forge CLI dispatcher
entities.description: Shell dispatcher installed to ~/.local/bin/forge. Routes 'build' and 'improve' to dist/cli/index.js; 'update' and 'uninstall' to shell scripts.

entities.name: forge CLI entry point
entities.description: Arg parser and router. Dispatches to runBuild() or runImproveCommand(). Compiled to dist/cli/index.js.

entities.name: Build Loop
entities.description: Autonomous build loop. Reads plan files from .forge/plans/, groups by wave, spawns Claude subprocesses per task, drives TUI, writes BLOCKER.md on failure, triggers improve pass on success.

entities.name: Improve Loop
entities.description: Iterative quality improvement pass. Reads last-build.json or explicit file list, spawns Claude to suggest improvements, applies up to maxIterations.

entities.name: Claude Spawner
entities.description: Spawns claude subprocess with --output-format=stream-json. Emits typed SpawnEvent objects (init, assistant, result, error).

entities.name: Alternate-screen TUI
entities.description: Terminal UI using alternate screen. Displays real-time build/improve progress, wave status, and task results.

entities.name: Stream-JSON Display Handler
entities.description: Consumes SpawnEvent stream from claude subprocess and renders to TUI.

entities.name: Plan File Parser
entities.description: Parses .forge/plans/*.md files with YAML frontmatter and XML task blocks. Produces typed PlanFile objects.

entities.name: CLI Types
entities.description: Shared TypeScript interfaces and Zod schemas for CLI layer: PlanFile, BuildState, TaskState, SpawnEvent, ImproveOptions, PlanFrontmatterSchema.

entities.name: Process Runner
entities.description: run(cmd, args, opts) — async child process spawner. Resolves binary via which, caps output at 10 MB, strips ANSI, supports timeout with SIGTERM.

entities.name: Dual Output
entities.description: dualOutput(data, formatter) — produces both structuredContent (JSON) and content (human text) for every MCP tool response.

entities.name: Error Factory
entities.description: makeError(category, message, suggestion) and handleRunError(). Typed error categories: command-not-found, permission-denied, timeout, invalid-input, not-found, command-failed.

entities.name: Input Validation
entities.description: assertNoFlagInjection() and assertNoFlagInjectionList(). Guards all user-supplied strings from starting with '-' to prevent CLI flag injection.

entities.name: Git Tools
entities.description: 10 MCP tools: git_status, git_log, git_diff, git_show, git_add, git_commit, git_push, git_pull, git_branch, git_checkout.

entities.name: Docker Tools
entities.description: 9 MCP tools for Docker: container list/inspect/logs/start/stop/remove, image list/pull/remove.

entities.name: Kubernetes Tools
entities.description: 9 MCP tools for kubectl: get pods/deployments/services/namespaces, describe, logs, apply, delete, rollout-status.

entities.name: pnpm Tools
entities.description: 5 MCP tools: pnpm_install, pnpm_build, pnpm_test, pnpm_lint, pnpm_run.

entities.name: Compliance Tools
entities.description: 6 MCP tools for NIGC 543.20 compliance: read/write change requests, audit trail append, deployment log, security audit, state management.

entities.name: Zod Schemas
entities.description: All Zod schemas and inferred TypeScript types for MCP tool responses: Git, Docker, K8s, pnpm shapes.

entities.name: Installer
entities.description: Primary install script. Checks prereqs (node>=20, git, pnpm), builds server, copies commands/agents/workflows to ~/.claude/, merges MCP config, writes CLI dispatcher, initializes user config.

entities.name: Update Script
entities.description: git pull + install.sh --update. Invoked by 'forge update'.

entities.name: Uninstall Script
entities.description: Removes ~/.claude/commands/forge/, ~/.claude/agents/forge-*.md, ~/.claude/workflows/forge/, forge-tools entry from MCP config, and ~/.local/bin/forge.

entities.name: forge-debugger
entities.description: Subagent for systematic debugging and incident diagnosis. Spawned by /forge:diagnose and /forge:fire workflows.

entities.name: forge-executor
entities.description: Subagent that executes implementation tasks from a plan. Spawned by build loop workflows.

entities.name: forge-improver
entities.description: Subagent for iterative quality improvements. Spawned by /forge:improve workflow.

entities.name: forge-mapper
entities.description: Subagent that scans the project and produces .forge/map/ files. Spawned by /forge:map and /forge:recon.

entities.name: forge-plan-checker
entities.description: Subagent that validates plan files against spec requirements before build authorization.

entities.name: forge-planner
entities.description: Subagent that decomposes specs into wave-ordered implementation plans. Spawned by /forge:plan.

entities.name: forge-researcher
entities.description: Subagent for research and context gathering. Spawned by /forge:discuss and /forge:spec.

entities.name: forge-reviewer
entities.description: Subagent for code review (correctness, style, maintainability). Spawned in parallel by /forge:review.

entities.name: forge-security
entities.description: Subagent for security audit. Spawned in parallel by /forge:review and /forge:secure.

entities.name: build workflow
entities.description: Gate 1 human gate. Loads spec + plans, spawns plan-checker, requires 'authorize' from user, writes CR document, begins autonomous implementation.

entities.name: review workflow
entities.description: Gate 2 human gate. Spawns forge-reviewer and forge-security in parallel, synthesizes findings, requires 'create-pr', writes REVIEW record, creates PR.

entities.name: release workflow
entities.description: Gate 3 human gate. Checks CI status, requires 'deploy', writes deployment log, merges PR, tags release, closes CR.

entities.name: spec workflow
entities.description: Produces structured PRD with testable acceptance criteria. Spawns forge-researcher.

entities.name: plan workflow
entities.description: Breaks spec into wave-ordered implementation graph. Spawns forge-planner.

entities.name: improve workflow
entities.description: Forge Loop continuous improvement cycle. Spawns forge-improver.

entities.name: diagnose workflow
entities.description: Systematic triage: env vars, secrets, config, connectivity. Spawns forge-debugger.

entities.name: fire workflow
entities.description: Incident response: TRIAGE → ISOLATE → DIAGNOSE → PATCH → DEBRIEF. Spawns forge-debugger.

entities.name: map workflow
entities.description: Initialize or refresh project map files in .forge/map/. Spawns forge-mapper.

entities.name: recon workflow
entities.description: Rapid codebase orientation pass.

entities.name: secure workflow
entities.description: Full security audit. Spawns forge-security.

entities.name: drift workflow
entities.description: Verify docs and registry match current codebase state.

entities.name: handoff workflow
entities.description: Capture session state for handoff. Writes .forge/handoffs/.

entities.name: continue workflow
entities.description: Resume from a handoff document. Reads .forge/handoffs/ or pending-resume.

entities.name: health workflow
entities.description: System health check across services and infrastructure.

entities.name: audit workflow
entities.description: NIGC compliance audit report generation.

entities.name: learn workflow
entities.description: Capture and store project instincts/patterns to .forge/instincts/.

entities.name: evolve workflow
entities.description: Evolve forge itself — promote local improvements to global skills.

entities.name: promote workflow
entities.description: Promote local improvements or instincts to global forge skills.

entities.name: docs workflow
entities.description: Documentation pass: inline docs, markdown docs, changelog, README. TICS/SICS generator.

entities.name: discuss workflow
entities.description: Explore problem space, surface assumptions, identify unknowns. Spawns forge-researcher.

entities.name: settings workflow
entities.description: Manage forge project and global configuration.

entities.name: status workflow
entities.description: Show current session/build state from .forge/state/current.md.

entities.name: quick workflow
entities.description: Fast-path task execution for small, well-defined changes.

entities.name: help workflow
entities.description: Display all available forge commands and their descriptions.

entities.name: Project Config
entities.description: Per-project forge settings: model_profile, gates (spec/pr/deploy approval), compliance prefix, concurrency limits.

entities.name: Claude MCP Config
entities.description: Claude Code MCP server registration. Contains forge-tools, nuxt-docs, nuxt-ui, context7 entries. Written/merged by install.sh.

entities.name: User Config
entities.description: Global user config: model_profile (balanced/fast/best), github_username. Initialized once at install.

entities.name: TypeScript Base Config
entities.description: Shared strict TypeScript compiler options: ES2022, Node16, strict, noUncheckedIndexedAccess, exactOptionalPropertyTypes.
